summary: Completed testing of reorganized Onorari (Fees) section in admin panel. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 tabs working (Per Categoria, Per Cliente, Statistiche, Tipi Onorario). Fee creation with IVA/IGIC tax calculation working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns empty list when clients have empty tipo_cliente field. The /api/fees/by-category uses fallback to 'autonomo' for unknown types, but /api/fees/category/{id}/clients queries for exact match. This causes mismatch - category card shows '2 clienti' but dialog shows 'Nessun cliente'.
minor.note: This is a data integrity issue - orphaned fees exist for deleted clients. Not a code bug.

critical_code_review_comments: GlobalFeesManagement.jsx is well-structured with 4 tabs: Per Categoria, Per Cliente, Statistiche, Tipi Onorario
Tax calculation (IVA/IGIC) working correctly with real-time preview in fee creation dialog
Recharts integration for monthly statistics working properly
Category cards show clean view with totals, client count, and recurring amounts
data-testid attributes present on category cards for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Note: 2 orphaned fees exist for deleted clients.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onorari section fully reorganized and tested. 4 tabs: Per Categoria (category cards with totals), Per Cliente (client list with filters), Statistiche (monthly charts with Recharts), Tipi Onorario (fee types management). Fee creation supports IVA/IGIC tax types with real-time calculation preview. Minor data issue: some fees are orphaned (client_id points to deleted clients).

backend_api.GET /api/fees/category/{id}/clients: ✓ Returns clients for category (empty due to data issue)

frontend_ui.Summary cards (4 colored): ✓ Totale Incassato, Da Incassare, Scaduti, Clienti Attivi
frontend_ui.Per Categoria tab: ✓ Category cards with totals, client count, recurring amounts
frontend_ui.Per Cliente tab: ✓ Client list with search and category filter
frontend_ui.Statistiche tab: ✓ Monthly bar chart with year/category filters
frontend_ui.Tipi Onorario tab: ✓ Fee types list with 'Nuovo Tipo' button
frontend_ui.Category detail dialog: ✓ Opens on card click (shows empty due to data issue)
frontend_ui.Client detail dialog: ✓ Shows client fees with 'Nuovo Onorario' button
frontend_ui.Fee creation dialog: ✓ All fields present including IVA/IGIC, recurring, reference month/year
frontend_ui.Tax preview: ✓ Real-time calculation of Netto, Imposta, Totale Lordo

data_integrity_note: 2 fees exist with client_ids that don't match any current clients (orphaned data). This causes the category card to show '2 clienti' but the detail dialog shows 'Nessun cliente'. Consider adding cleanup for orphaned fees or updating the category/clients endpoint to handle this case.
